key_insights.insight: Early exposure to rough play can accelerate one's progress in competitive sports.
key_insights.quote: Just out the front of where I live is like on the front is a park and like the older guys will just be out the front playingand that's me at likeseven eight trying to get involved and these guys are like 15 16 and they were playing roughno matter if you're eight nine ten trying to play with us play with them they're going to be roughso that kind of helped me into today's game how how I am now, progress a lot quicker.

key_insights.insight: Rejection can lead to new opportunities and a better fit elsewhere.
key_insights.quote: Somebody else might value my qualities a lot more than Leicester did.

key_insights.insight: After achieving a significant goal, it's important to avoid complacency and increase effort to continue progressing.
key_insights.quote: This is where the hard work starts. It's not finished. You can't pull it on cruise control. You got to go to extra gear.

key_insights.insight: It's beneficial to have a mentality of being a top performer even when at a lower level, to maintain motivation and push for growth.
key_insights.quote: No matter where you are,if you have that mentality that you're a Premier League player,but at the moment you're just on League One, that's fine.But if you don't have that mentality thatI'm a Premier League player,so I don't need to try here,then it's not going to work out.

key_insights.insight: Supportive managers can have a transformative impact on a player's career, particularly when the player feels valued.
key_insights.quote: When I'm loved by a manager I feel like and a club I feel like it's in me to want to give back I want to do a lot of things for like run for a brickwall for the manager that's wanting me in this position.

key_insights.insight: Having children can significantly shift one's focus and drive, leading to increased motivation and better decision-making.
key_insights.quote: I feel like I've got people to provide for...so if i could school goals and help boththen it's perfect so i think that's what helped me pick things up and how to provide for peopledoes that focus you...did it make your game better? 100% yeah.

key_insights.insight: A unified and supportive team culture, where everyone is treated equally and works together, can be a significant factor in success.
key_insights.quote: I feel like they're together in this as well...everybodymixes with everybody...there's nonobody at the club thinks they're better thannobody...we're allin it together so i feel like that comes from the manager and his philosophy at the club andhow he wants things to be run.

key_insights.insight: Admitting a problem and accepting responsibility, even if partially, can be a crucial step in clearing a path forward and focusing on career goals.
key_insights.quote: I was willing to takeresponsibilityjust to get the processall over and done with because having that hovering over me and trying to concentratemy career is not is not the best feeling...

key_insights.insight: The challenge of overcoming doubt and negativity can fuel motivation and lead to even greater achievements.
key_insights.quote: There's a lot ofhaters and doubtersout there thinkinghe ain't going to bethe same man when hecomes backactually they're right I'm going to be a different man. I'm going to be even better than that guy that scored them goals before.

key_insights.insight: Maintaining an unwavering self-belief is vital, even when facing adversity, and focusing on scoring consistently can keep the doubts at bay.
key_insights.quote: Every time I step on a pitchI'm thinking in my headI'm going to score todayI'm going to scoreI know I'm going to scorewhen the chance comesI'm going to score because in a game you you bounce get a chance that you should be scoring.

actionable_advice.advice: Improve financial management by seeking guidance and being mindful of spending habits.
actionable_advice.how_to: Consult with a financial advisor to create a budget, track expenses, and make informed investment decisions. Avoid impulsive purchases and prioritize essential needs over fleeting desires.

actionable_advice.advice: Cultivate a supportive environment by surrounding yourself with positive influences.
actionable_advice.how_to: Identify individuals who offer encouragement and constructive criticism. Limit exposure to toxic relationships and environments that undermine your self-esteem and goals.

actionable_advice.advice: Develop a resilient mindset by embracing challenges and learning from setbacks.
actionable_advice.how_to: View failures as opportunities for growth and self-improvement. Focus on controllables and maintain a positive outlook, even in the face of adversity.

actionable_advice.advice: Harness the power of self-belief by consistently visualizing success.
actionable_advice.how_to: Before each game, mentally rehearse scoring and achieving key objectives. Maintain a firm conviction in your abilities and trust your training.

actionable_advice.advice: Focus on actions rather than words, letting your performance do the talking.
actionable_advice.how_to: Instead of engaging in debates or arguments, invest your energy in improving your skills and achieving your goals. Demonstrate your capabilities through tangible results.

memorable_stories: Being rejected by Leicester at age 15.
Getting the Newcastle call and the Wolves situation.
Finding out about being banned from football and missing the world cup.
Encountering racism at a petrol station while with family.
Being denied entry to a restaurant.
contrarian_claims: Crying isn't always necessary or helpful for processing emotions.
Loan spells, though seemingly a step back, can be formative for young players.
Taking the knee has lost its purpose as an effective anti-racism gesture.
Having a gambling addiction is not an excuse or reason for punishment.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Ivan Toney: I’m Finally Ready To Speak! The Truth About His Football Ban And His Future Team!
